title: Consuming Shadow
description: At the end of your turn, [gold]Evoke[/gold] your leftmost Orb.
smart_description: At the end of your turn, [gold]Evoke[/gold] your {Amount:plural:|[blue]{}[/blue]} leftmost {Amount:plural:Orb|Orbs}.
notes: Counter stack type increases the number of orbs evoked per turn. Each stack will trigger one evoke action for your leftmost orb.
